title: Acadia Pharmaceuticals (ACAD) Tops Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Acadia Pharmaceuticals topped analyst expectations for Q2 2025 earnings and revenue. The biopharmaceutical company reported earnings per share of $0.16, beating the estimate of $0.13. Total revenues reached $264.6 million, representing 9% year-over-year growth. NUPLAZID generated $168.5 million in sales, up 7% year-over-year, while DAYBUE recorded $96.1 million in net product sales, up 14% year-over-year. The company raised its full-year 2025 revenue guidance to $1.045-$1.095 billion from $1.030-$1.095 billion. NUPLAZID guidance was increased to $665-$690 million from $650-$690 million. Daybue U.S. sales guidance remains at $380-$405 million for 2025. The strong performance was driven by continued commercialization success of both core products.
